propositions: Pass-4 coaching currently runs only over surviving advisory findings, so blocking findings receive no coaching note or guide_url.
Blocking findings must get a coaching entry with a move_id, deterministically rendered note, and guide_url deep-link like advisory findings do.
Coaching must be widened at both the coach_inputs op and the kernel coach() so coachable = blocking + surviving (blocking first).
Both structurally identical coach blocks in the then-arm and else-arm of plan-review.yaml must receive the same edits and remain binding-identical.
Each rendered coaching entry must carry a decision tag (block or advisory) that survives sidecar persistence via build_payload.
The coach prompt and listing header must be reframed decision-neutral so they no longer describe the input set as advisory-only.
